questions.question: Which fundamental digital circuit component is primarily used to store a single bit of information and serves as the basic memory element in sequential logic circuits?
options: Multiplexer
Flip-flop
Decoder
Encoder
Adder

questions.question: In the context of computer architecture, what is the primary function of a 'microcode' engine within a CPU?
options: To manage cache coherence protocols across multiple cores
To translate complex machine instructions into a sequence of simpler micro-operations for execution
To perform floating-point arithmetic operations at high speed
To arbitrate access to the main memory bus
To handle interrupts and exceptions within the processor pipeline

questions.question: In the ASIC design flow, what is the main objective of 'Library Characterization'?
options: To define the logical functionality of custom IP blocks
To verify the correctness of the RTL design against specifications
To generate timing, power, and noise models for standard cells and IP blocks for use in synthesis and physical design
To optimize the placement of macros and standard cells on the die
To simulate the design's behavior under various input stimuli

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of 'Voltage and Frequency Scaling (VFS)', often implemented through Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling (DVFS), in modern System-on-Chip (SoC) designs?
options: To improve signal integrity by reducing electromagnetic interference
To increase the processing speed of the CPU indefinitely
To dynamically adjust power consumption and performance based on workload requirements
To reduce the physical size of the chip by operating at lower voltages
To prevent clock skew issues across different clock domains

questions.question: In advanced semiconductor manufacturing, what does 'Yield' primarily refer to?
options: The maximum clock frequency at which a chip can reliably operate
The number of functional dies produced per wafer
The average power consumption of a fabricated integrated circuit
The amount of raw silicon material used in wafer production
The total throughput of the manufacturing facility in a given period
